visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with short hair, wearing a grey flat cap and glasses, is the sole person on camera. He is dressed in a white t-shirt and speaks directly to the lens against a purple and blue studio background. A large pink and white graphic about a government payout appears in the bottom half. (2) The scene uses fast-paced cuts as the man gestures frequently with his hands. Various colorful text overlays and cartoonish icons (like a thief emoji and social media logos) appear and disappear around him to illustrate his points. (3) The camera remains at an eye-level medium shot throughout the video, focusing on the man's facial expressions and upper body movements. The lighting is bright and even studio light, emphasizing the clarity of the text graphics. (4) In the final phase, the text shifts to focus on a phone number '165' and the man continues to point emphatically, his mouth moving in a fast, rhythmic manner as he delivers his warning.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Slogan]: 普發一萬 全民+1 政府相挺 10000 普發現金. (2) [Variety]: 成為最新的詐騙誘餌. (3) [Variety]: 詐騙集團近期. (4) [Variety]: 一萬放大術 全民可領. (5) [Variety]: 但實際上是詐騙!. (6) [Variety]: 光是今年1到9月. (7) [Variety]: 下架超過7萬則的詐騙廣告. (8) [Logo]: facebook. (9) [Logo]: Threads. (10) [Variety]: 情侶分手 二手出清. (11) [Variety]: 你的銀行網銀去轉帳. (12) [Variety]: 所以刑事局特別提醒說. (13) [Logo]: LINE. (14) [Variety]: 凡是要求加LINE的. (15) [Variety]: 提供金融帳戶的. (16) [Variety]: 點擊不明連結的. (17) [Variety]: 我跟你講 幾乎都是詐騙. (18) [Slogan]: 165反詐騙專線. (19) [Variety]: 要提高警覺哦.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the information.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing glasses, a grey flat cap, and a white t-shirt. He has a friendly and energetic appearance.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, solid-colored studio background featuring shades of light purple and blue with minimal detail.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-energy electronic background music featuring a strong, steady beat. A male narrator starts speaking immediately with a professional, assertive tone and high articulation clarity. (2) A 'whoosh' sound effect triggers as the first large graphic is displayed, followed by a sharp 'impact' sound for the first text emphasis. (3) As the speaker lists different scam types, multiple 'pop' and 'ding' sound effects are used in quick succession to highlight each point. The music tempo remains consistent, providing a rhythmic base for the speech. (4) A distinctive 'bell' chime is heard when the '165' hotline number is mentioned, marking a key instructional moment. The voice remains energetic and commanding until the very end, concluding with a clean fade-out of the background music.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Problem -> Data Evidence -> Solution/CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To educate and warn the public about recent scams involving fake government payout announcements, providing specific examples of scam tactics and promoting the '165' anti-fraud hotline.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high density of visual and auditory cues to maintain viewer attention, typical of short-form social media alerts.
